notes: Hand-curated seed list for the Phase 14C event research engine. Each entry maps to one row in event_campaigns. The generator picks the next future occurrence of recurring events using event_month + event_day. One-off events (e.g. FIFA 2026) carry a static_year. scoring_inputs feeds event-campaign-scoring.ts; downstream factual fields (hotel_angle, cta, etc.) seed the AI generation prompt in Phase 14D. All categories used here are drawn from VORTEX_EVENT_CAMPAIGN_SKILL.md §3.
